narrative:
Independence City has 5,910 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.9% D−R vs -8.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
